steps.title: Set profit equal to target
steps.content:
The profit function is $p(x) = 6x - 216$. To earn a profit of $420, we set:
$$6x - 216 = 420$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 216 to both sides:
$$6x = 636$$
Divide both sides by 6:
$$x = 106$$
They must sell 106 car magnets to earn $420 in profit.
